Author: You
Name: Bisme
Punchline: In-game meld optimizer with BisBuddy export and overcap awareness.
Description: FFXIV in-game meld optimizer. Pick a job, load your equipped gear, click Auto-Optimize: the plugin picks the best food and places materia to match the BiS target while respecting per-piece stat caps.
